sentence: 公众要求政府提高财政透明度。
pinyin: Gōngzhòng yāoqiú zhèngfǔ tígāo cáizhèng tòumíngdù.
english: The public demands the government improve fiscal transparency.

sentence: 学校的北侧有一片操场。
pinyin: Xuéxiào de běicè yǒu yī piàn cāochǎng.
english: There is a sports field on the north side of the school.

sentence: 这个区间内所有的值都大于零。
pinyin: Zhège qūjiān nèi suǒyǒu de zhí dōu dàyú líng.
english: All values in this interval are greater than zero.

sentence: 那个年代，很多青年立志救国。
pinyin: Nà gè niándài, hěn duō qīngnián lìzhì jiùguó.
english: In that era, many young people were determined to save the nation.

meaning: 1. the most honorable; 2. the most respected; 3. supreme; 4. (archaic)
sentence: 这款套餐被称为至尊版。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn tàocān bèi chēng wéi zhìzūn bǎn.
english: This package is called the supreme edition.
